detail.description:
Welcome to Cat Tiles: Cute Piano Game, amazing piano fun with your cat friend. Enjoy yourself in the world of lovely, colorful cats while relaxing to exciting music that follows the rhythm of the music.
Cute cats can let you immerse yourself in new song melodies, renew your soul, and feel cheerful during the rest of the day.

This relaxing cat game is for all ages, especially cat lovers all around the world.

How to Play:
- Tap the cat piano to play the piano and make amazing sounds.
